title: Easy Forklift Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Warehouse Forklift Toy Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Color a simple warehouse forklift lifting a box. Designed for toddlers and young kids. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The Forklift uses a heavy metal counterweight at the rear of the vehicle to prevent tipping over when carrying heavy loads.
Forklifts are industrial warehouse vehicles used to lift and move heavy pallets of cargo weighing up to several tons.
